personalInfo.name: Laurence Mendoza
personalInfo.title: Software Engineer
personalInfo.bio: Crafting web applications that make your ideas happen.

projects.title: Teyvat Ordering System
projects.description: A kiosk-style ordering system featuring all dishes inspired from Genshin Impact.

projects.title: Faculty Attendance and Room Management System
projects.description: A system to manage faculty attendance and classroom assignments efficiently at Westmead International School.

projects.title: SecureMoto: An IoT-Based Theft Prevention System for Two-Wheel Motor Vehicles
projects.description: An IoT-based system designed to prevent theft of two-wheel motor vehicles by providing real-time monitoring and alert notifications to the owner.

keyResponsibilities: Answered patient inquiries via phone, email, and chat promptly and professionally.
Assisted patients in scheduling appointments and managing their healthcare accounts.
Resolved billing and insurance-related issues while ensuring patient confidentiality.
Documented patient interactions accurately in the CRM system.
Provided support and guidance on healthcare services, policies, and procedures.

workExperience.company: United Doctors of Saint Camillus De Lellis Hospital and Medical Center
keyResponsibilities: Provided technical support for hospital staff, troubleshooting computers, printers, and other medical equipment.
Installed and maintained Ethernet connections, network devices, and telecommunication systems.
Diagnosed and resolved hardware and software issues to ensure uninterrupted hospital operations.
Assisted staff with dial tone, phone setups, and other communication systems.
Documented IT incidents and resolutions, and coordinated with vendors for complex technical problems.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
education.description: Completed a comprehensive curriculum in computer science, including courses in data structures, algorithms, software engineering, and artificial intelligence. Worked on several projects, including a web application for managing student organizations and a mobile app for tracking fitness activities.
